children.text:
Welcome to Talk2! You can now chat with your friends for FREE! Enjoy a free Philippine mobile number with our affordable packages for calls and SMS to the Philippines!
Best of all, your family and friends back in the Philippines can call and text you anywhere in the world at local PH rates!
You are no longer part of this group.
All messages between Talk2 users are free. Turn this on if you would rather send to the person's non-Talk2 mobile number in case your contact is offline.
